business.name: Vibe Bistro
business.oneLiner: Locally-sourced, chef-fired comfort food and natural-wine cocktails — served loud in the heart of the city.
business.about: Born in 2024 out of a supper club that got way too popular, Vibe Bistro is where your grandma's recipes meet a Gen-Z playlist. Everything's made from scratch with produce from farms we can actually name — big flavor, zero pretension.

signature: Come for the vibe, stay because the food actually slaps.

services.title: The Big Vibe Burger
services.blurb: Double smash patty, aged cheddar, house pickles, secret orange sauce.

services.title: Electric Negroni
services.blurb: Barrel-aged gin, blood-orange bitters, a neon twist. Proceed with caution.

services.title: Firecracker Risotto
services.blurb: Charred corn, calabrian chili, crispy parmesan. Brings the heat.
